hooks.description: Prevent console.log from being committed in production code
hooks.error_message: console.log found in src/ — remove before committing
hooks.created_from_lesson: YYYY-MM-DD: console.log left in payment handler caused log noise in prod

hooks.description: Block commits containing migration files unless task is classified L2
hooks.error_message: Migration file detected — ensure task is classified L2 and reviewed
hooks.created_from_lesson: YYYY-MM-DD: schema change merged without reviewer approval broke staging

_instructions: Remove the example entries above and add your own hooks.
Each hook must have a 'created_from_lesson' that references an actual incident.
Do not add hooks speculatively — only add them after a real failure or near-miss.
trigger values: pre-commit | pre-push | pre-build | on-stage-gate
For check_type 'shell': pattern_or_command is a shell command; exit 0 = pass, non-zero = fail
